headline: Is It Too Late To Look At APA (APA) After A 154% One Year Surge?
summary: Investors may be wondering if APA at around US$40.13 is still offering value after a strong run, or if most of the easy gains are already behind it. The share price has moved 6.4% over the last 7 days, while the 1 year return stands at 154.0% and the year to date return is 58.2%, despite a 4.5% pullback over the past month. Recent coverage has focused on APA's position in the energy sector and how its business profile fits into broader market interest in commodity exposed names. This context...
